info.title: NFC Loyalty & Customer Growth Platform API
info.description: REST API untuk platform loyalty berbasis NFC/QR untuk UMKM Indonesia. Menyediakan fitur registrasi member, pemesanan, validasi pembayaran manual, poin loyalitas, voucher, dan dashboard analytics.

post.description: Register a new member. If WhatsApp already exists, performs auto-login. Issues welcome voucher if configured.

details.message: Format nomor WhatsApp tidak valid (08xx atau +628xx, 10-13 digit)

get.summary: Get all menu categories with items (public)

200.description: List of categories with menu items

items.name: Nasi Goreng Spesial
items.description: Nasi goreng dengan telur dan ayam

example.name: Nasi Goreng Spesial
example.description: Nasi goreng dengan telur, ayam, dan sayuran

data.name: Nasi Goreng Spesial
data.description: Nasi goreng dengan telur, ayam, dan sayuran

post.description: Create new order from cart items. Optionally apply voucher code.

get.description: Filterable by status. Pending sorted oldest first, others newest first.

error.message: Order sudah dalam status paid, tidak bisa diubah

get.description: Returns rewards that are active and affordable for the member.

post.description: Records a Google review link click. Grants one-time reward if configured.

get.summary: Get dormant members (no visit in 30 days)

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token (15min). Get from /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, or /api/auth/admin/login
